vibe: Welcoming, premium, inclusive, family-friendly yet precise

headings.usage: Use tight tracking (tracking-tighter) for massive headers. Never center by default. Use expressive sizes (text-5xl to text-6xl+ for hero).

body.usage: Leading-relaxed for readability. High contrast against background.

colors.rationale: Warm Sand (HSL 40 20% 97%) base to feel organic and grounded. Terracotta (HSL 20 48% 46%) primary for approachable energy. Espresso dark mode for premium contrast. Avoiding generic tech blue or flat gray.

layouts.spacing_strategy: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for major sections. Emphasize asymmetry and negative space.
layouts.hero_section: Hero should feature the 4.9★ rating prominently. Use an overlapping bento grid or large typography alongside the rustic interior image. Max 30% black overlay if full screen.
layouts.services_list: Avoid generic cards. Use 'Grid Borders' pattern (visible skeleton) or pure HTML/Tailwind tabular list with sharp borders. Must look like a high-end menu.
layouts.gallery: Bento Grid (Mode A: The Tetris Grid). Mix col-span-4 row-span-1 with tall and wide blocks. Asymmetry creates tension. Leave some cells empty for negative space.
layouts.contact_map: Embed map with deep, muted colors. Include address (1731 Dancy Blvd), Hours (Open · Closes 6 PM), and CTA.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none). Rich solid color on hover with a slight lift (-translate-y-1). Use explicit focus rings.
components.booking_flow: Use Shadcn Dialog/Tabs. Minimal steps: Choose Service -> Specialist -> Date/Time -> Preferences -> Review -> Confirm. Use inclusive inputs (e.g., hair texture, communication preference).
components.admin_dashboard: Strict grid hierarchy (Mode B: Control Room Grid). Tight spacing (gap-4). Dense data display for appointments using Shadcn tables.
components.navigation: Sticky header with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70). Must include primary 'Book Now' CTA.

motion.page_transitions: Framer motion staggered fade-in up for lists (e.g., gallery items, barbers).
motion.hover_states: Hover states must have higher contrast. explicit text color changes on hover.
motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling to provide momentum and weight.

hero.description: Rustic modern barber shop interior with warm lighting.
hero.usage: Main hero background or prominent hero image to set the welcoming atmosphere.

gallery_precision.usage: Gallery bento grid - Tall block to highlight 'Quality Precision Cuts'.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'npm install @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion @studio-freight/lenis' before starting.
HTML STRUCTURE: Do not use generic Shadcn Card wrappers for marketing sections. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for asymmetric bento layouts.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and tab triggers. E.g., data-testid='book-now-hero-btn', data-testid='service-select-fade'.
ICONS: Use @phosphor-icons/react for high-end, crisp iconography. Avoid generic Lucide if possible, or use Lucide with stroke-width 1.5 for elegance.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure header has a frosted glass background (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70) to ensure text legibility over any scrolling images.
APP LOGIC: Implement the booking flow inside a dedicated multi-step form or dialog, featuring distinct steps (Service -> Barber -> Date -> Details).
FONTS: Import 'Outfit' and 'Work Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css. Apply them globally in tailwind.config.js.
DASHBOARD: Make the Admin Dashboard dense and functional. Use flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders, no shadows.
VIBE CHECK: Maintain the welcoming family atmosphere by using the curated imagery and warm copy. Avoid dark 'bro-barber' cliches.
